channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: Storybook-based narrative adventure game The Day I Became a Bird launches April 16 for PS5, Switch, and PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Switch

Follow the story of Frank, a quiet child with big feelings.

The Day I Became a Bird, a narrative adventure game inspired by children’s literature and animated storytelling, will launch for PlayStation 5, Switch, and PC via Steam on April 16 for $19.99 / £12.99 / €14.99, publisher Numskull Games and developer Hyper Luminal Games announced. The game is based on a storybook by French author Ingrid Chabbert and Spanish illustrator Guridi, with accompanying animated short by PASSION Animation.

“The heart of this project was always about capturing what love feels like before you really have the words for it,” said PASSION Animation founder and CEO Andrew Ruhemann in a press release. “We wanted to create something that feels like a picture book you can step inside, where small moments and quiet feelings matter just as much as big story beats.”

Author Ingrid Chabbert added, “When I first imagined Frank’s story, it was always about that very small, very brave feeling of wanting to be seen by someone you really care about. Seeing it take flight as a game has been incredibly moving. It allows players not just to read about those emotions, but to step inside them—to feel the tenderness, the awkwardness, and the quiet courage of first love in a completely new way.”

A $24.49 / £17.99 / €19.99 “Feathered Adventurer Edition” will also be available, which features the base game and film with a digital art book and the original soundtrack.

Here is an overview of the game, via Numskull Games:

The Day I Became a Bird tells the story of Frank, a quiet child with big feelings as he develops his first crush on Sylvia—who only has eyes for birds. This cozy game is a gentle, painterly journey through classrooms, playgrounds, and imagined spaces, as Frank navigates love, shyness, and self-expression. Through exploration, collection, and light puzzle-solving, he sets out with one simple goal: to capture Sylvia’s attention.

Based on a storybook by French author, Ingrid Chabbert and Spanish illustrator, Guridi, and accompanying animated short by Passion Animation, the game blends those visuals with light and delicate interaction and is designed to be warm, welcoming, and emotionally resonant, offering a reflective alternative to the fast-paced, high-pressure play that tends to dominate. The game invites players of all ages to experience a world shaped by curiosity, vulnerability, transformation—and to fly like a bird!

The Day I Became a Bird draws on PASSION’s roots in animation and storytelling, alongside Hyper Luminal Games’ talent for building heartfelt narrative adventure games, bringing a hand-crafted, illustrative aesthetic to an interactive format. The title focuses on mood, movement, and emotional clarity rather than traditional mechanics, positioning itself as a narrative experience as much as a game.

Watch a new trailer below.

Release Date Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/storybook-based-narrative-adventure-game-the-day-i-became-a-bird-launches-april-16-for-ps5-switch-and-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Darksiders Warmastered Edition coming to PS5, Xbox Series on May 19
item.content:encoded:
• PS5
  • Xbox Series

Available both physically and digitally.

THQ Nordic will release Darksiders Warmastered Edition for PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series both physically and digitally on May 19 for $29.99, the company announced.

Darksiders Warmastered Edition previously launched for PlayStation 4, Xbox One, Wii U, Switch, and PC via Steam, Epic Games Store, adn GOG.

Here is an overview of the game, via THQ Nordic:

About

Brought before the sacred Charred Council, War is indicted for his crimes and stripped of his powers. Dishonored and facing his own death, War is given the opportunity to return to Earth to search for the truth and punish those responsible. Hunted by a vengeful group of Angels, War must take on the forces of Hell, forge uneasy alliances with the very demons he hunts, and journey across the ravaged remains of the Earth on his quest for vengeance and vindication.

Key Features

  • Apocalyptic Power – Unleash the wrath of War, combining brutal attacks and supernatural abilities to decimate all who stand in your way.
  • Extreme Arsenal – Wield a devastating arsenal of angelic, demonic and Earthly weapons; and blaze a trail of destruction atop Ruin, War’s fiery phantom steed.
  • Epic Quest – Battle across the wastelands and demon-infested dungeons of the decimated Earth in your quest for vengeance and redemption.
  • Character Progression – Uncover powerful ancient relics, upgrade your weapons, unlock new abilities, and customize your gameplay style.
  • Battle Heaven and Hell – Battle against all who stand in your way—from war-weary angelic forces to Hell’s hideous demon hordes.
  • Languages – Full: German, English, French, Italian, Spanish, Russian, and Japanese. Text: German, English, Italian, French, Spanish, Russian, Polish, Chinese Simp., Japanese, Portuguese (Brazilian), Korean, and Czech.

Watch a new trailer below.

PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/darksiders-warmastered-edition-coming-to-ps5-xbox-series-on-may-19
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Palworld! More Than Just Pals ‘Special Video’, characters detailed
item.content:encoded:
• PC

Meet Katress, Lovander, Zoe, Chillet Ignis, Saya, Tarantriss, and Splatterina.

Pocketpair has released a new trailer, information, and screenshots for Palworld! More Than Just Pals, its Palworld dating simulation game first introduced as an April Fools’ joke in 2024, which Pocketpair assures is real and in development.

Here are the details:

■ About

What lies inside the mysterious World Tree? An exciting school life filled with cute Pals! Will you remain friends or fall in love? Or dismantle and eat them…

Your dream school romance starts here in this Palworld dating sim!

■ Characters

Mysterious Transfer Student: Katress

A mysterious transfer student with a cute jealous streak when you talk to others.

Freshman Hunter: Lovander

A senpai who prowls for new students every year, viewing romance as a “hunt.”

Childhood Friend: Zoe

Orphaned at a young age, she lives with her older brother, Grizzbolt. Cool and strong-willed, she tends to be extra harsh when it comes to you.

Chillet’s Little Sister: Chillet Ignis

Chillet’s innocent little sister who loves him dearly.

A single headpat turns her into a clingy, blushing mess, but she may have a surprisingly bold side reserved just for you…?

School Nurse: Saya

A glamorous school nurse who sneaks a sip or two while on the job. Trusted by students as a confidante, she teases you with her seductive charm once the door is locked. Are you ready for a taste of forbidden love…?

Genki Girl: Tarantriss

An energetic spider-girl who spins her own silk. Bright and bubbly, she loves giving you handmade scarves and accessories.

Psychotic Yandere: Splatterina

A knife-wielding girl with a dangerous edge. Deeply jealous and overwhelmingly possessive, she has a penchant for confinement, and won’t forgive you if your eyes wander to anyone else.

Palworld! More Than Just Pals will be available for PC via Steam.

Watch the trailer below. View the screenshots at the gallery.

Special Video

English

Japanese

Screenshots

  • ❮
  • ❯


https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/palworld-more-than-just-pals-special-video-characters-detailed
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: R-Type Tactics I • II Cosmos launches June 18 in the west
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS4
  • PS5
  • Switch
  • Switch 2
  • Xbox Series

First launched on March 12 in Japan.

Strategy RPG collection R-Type Tactics I • II Cosmos will launch for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, PlayStation 4, Switch, and PC via Steam, Epic Games Store on June 18 in the west, publisher NIS America announced.

R-Type Tactics I • II Cosmos first launched on March 12 in Japan.

A limited edition is currently available for pre-order via NIS America Online Store for PlayStation 5, PlayStation 4, and Switch for $79.99. It includes the R-Type Tactics I • II Cosmos Deluxe Edition, two-disc soundtrack, conceptual art card set, Rwf-9A ARROW HEAD acrylic stand, Bwf-1Dα BYDO SYSTEM α acrylic stand, and a collector’s box. The limited and Deluxe editions for Xbox Series X|S are no longer planned.

Here is an overview of the collection, via NIS America:

About

As the Bydo continue to eliminate humanity, you must outsmart and outmaneuver them if the Space Corps has any hope of victory. That is, until you find yourself fighting alongside the very forces you were tasked with destroying…

R-Type Tactics I • II Cosmos turns tactical, turn-based strategy gameplay on its side for a one-of-a-kind R-Type experience! This two-game collection blasts its way onto Nintendo Switch, PlayStation 4, PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X|S, and PC, with R-Type Tactics II also making its debut in the West for the first time! Deploy your forces across multiple campaigns, playing as both the Space Corps and the Bydo. With hundreds of ships and levels to choose from between both games, along with branching missions and a brand-new post-game story, R-Type Tactics I • II Cosmos is packed with out-of-this-world content!

Key Features

  • New Frontiers – Along with the debut of R-Type Tactics II in the West, both this title and R-Type Tactics I make their way from the PSP to modern consoles for the first time!
  • Whose Side Are You On? – Multiple campaigns for each faction, as well as branching storylines in R-Type Tactics II, allow for a unique gameplay experience across both titles while fleshing out the world of R-Type and the origins of the sinister Bydo Empire.
  • Explore the COSMOS – A brand-new set of missions following the end of Tactics II gives you even more content than ever before!

Watch a new trailer below.

Release Date Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/r-type-tactics-i-ii-cosmos-launches-june-18-in-the-west
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
